'''鈭歯g-v-g-l''' ('''kangavgeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:japonise|japonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:japonise|japonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-v-g-l
|-
! Lemma
| kangavgeloko
|}
